Title: Authorizes the use of a confirmation of trafficking victim status as evidence of identity for the issuance of an identification card
Summary: Authorizes the use of a confirmation of trafficking victim status issued by OTDA as evidence of identity for the issuance of a non-driver identification card.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to proof of identity for the issuance of a non-driver identification card
